title: Aalayabeedam Vaarungale Iraimakkale
lyrics:
Aalaya peedam vaarungal iraimakkalae
Aandavan sannidhi saerungal iraikulamae
Manathaangalgalodu alla manamaatrangalodu sella - 2
Samabandhi virundhil sangamippom
1.Vaazhkaiyum vazhipaadum inaindhidavae

Vaarthaiyai vaazhvaai amaithiduvom
Niraivaai peruvadhae arulenbom
Iruppadhai pagirvdhae samamenbom
Nalvaazhvae aanmeega vazhipaadu - 2
Indhadh thiruppali adharkor aerpaadu

2.Iraivaarthai neriyae unmai vazhi
Idhayathai thaetrum inba mozhi
Thannaiyae tharugindra thalaivan vazhi
Pagirvil uyarvu kaanum neri - indha
Unmaiyai naalum unandhidavae - 2
Indhadh thiruppali adharkor aerpaadu

title: Aalayathil Naam Nuzhaigayile
lyrics:
Aalayathil naam nuzhaigaiyilae
Pudhu ninaivugal ezhugindrana
Andha ninaivugalin pudhu varugaiyilae
Nam nenjangal niraigindrana aa... (2)
1. Anbaana maganai paligodutha
Aabraham ingae therigindraar (2)
Panbaana aattinai paliyeendha Aabelum ingae therigindraar
2. Erusalaim aalayam nuzhaindavudan
Iesuvum angae mozhindhaarae (2)
En veedu idhu seba veedu vankalvar gugaiyaai maatradheer

title: Aananda Gaanangal Anbudan
lyrics:
Aanandha gaanangal anbudan isaithae
Aandhavar illam selvom (2)
Endrum avaniyil maandhar anbinil milira
Arul vaendi baliyiduvom (2)

1. Urundodum vaazhvil karaindhidum naalai
Olipetruh thigazha varam kaetkirom (2)
Gaanamum kaatrum vaerillaiyae - 2
Neeyindri en vaazhvil vaerillaiyae vaerillaiyae

2. Vidiyalin panithuli midipadavae - um
Vidiyalin kanavai yaam kandidanum (2)
Manadhinai kaakkum maanbudanae (2)
Manangalai baliyida varugindrom varugindrom

title: Aananda Geethangal Muzhangida
lyrics:
Aanandha geethangal muzhangida ezhuvom
Aandhavar aalayam nuzhaindhiduvom (2)
Vaarungal vaarungal vaazhthiduvom (2)
Vaanpugazh innisai isaithiduvom

1. Vidiyalin vaelvigal padaithidavae
Viduthalai vaazhvinai pagirndhidavae (2)
Vaazhthidu iraikulamae vanangidu iraivanaiyae
Pugazhdhidu baliyinilae valarndhidu anbinilae

2. Iraivanai thaedidum uravugalae
Iraivazhi vaazhndhida vaarungalae (2)
Samathuva uravinilae sangamam aagidavae
Urimaigal adaindhidavae uravinil inaindhidavae

title: Aananda Malargalaaga Anbiyam
lyrics:
Aanandha malargalaaga anbiyam malara vaendum
Aaviyin kodaigal anaithum agilathai nirappa vaendum
Maanuda naeyangal mannil malara vaendum (indha) - 2

1. Visuvaasam anbu nambikkai ennum
Kadavulin kodaigalil - adhil
Anbondru mattum iraivanin vazhiyil agilathai aalumae
Vinnavarin anbin arasu
Mannavaril nilaikka vaendum (2)
Punitha boobaalam isaithida innaivom
Vaazhga anbiyam niraivaazhvin kaedayam - 2

Saadhigal maraindhu baedhangal ozhindhu nambikkaiyil nilaithida
Pirar kuraigalai marandhu kutrangalai mannithu
Samathuvam kaanuvom - vinnavarin ... ...

title: Aandavar Avaiyinil Paadungalae
lyrics:
Aandhavar avaiyinil paadungalae nalla
Aanandha geethangalae nalla aanandha geethangalae (2)

1. Idhayangal innoli ezhubbidumae nam
Avayangal arulisai paadidumae (2)
Ninaivinil geethangal suzhandridumae aa... - 2
Anaivarin anbanai vaazhthidavae

2. Manamennum koyilil thoranangal - nam
Magizhchiyai parappidum maniyoligal (2)
Idhayathin ezhuchiyae thoobappugai aa... - 2
Idhayathin anbanai vanangidavae

title: Aandavar Sannithi Varungale
lyrics:
Aandhavar sannidhi vaarungalae nal
Aanandhamudanae paadungalae (2)
Iesuvin ninaivil magizhungalae - 2 indha
Igamadhil naalum muzhangungalae vaarungalae - 4

1. Ullangal magizhum uravugal malarum
Iraivan anbil vaazhndhu vandhaal
Aduthavar nalanil naattamae kondaal
Aandhavar vazhiyinil nadandhidalaam
Kuraigalai kaanaamal pirarai aettral
Iesuvai avaril kandidalaam (2)
Iraippani thodara iraiyaatshi malara
Inaindhiduvom naam iraivanilae (2)

2. Saadhigal illai baedhangal illai
Iraivan iesu varugaiyilae
Needhiyum undu samathuvam undu
Iraivan vaazhum samogathilae
Anbae kadavul enbadhai unandhaal
Iniya ulagam padaithidalaam (2)
Kuzhandhai iesu ullathil pirandhaal
Pudhiya piraviyaai vaazhndhidalaam (2)

title: Aandavarin Thirusannithiyil
lyrics:
Aandhavarin thirusannidhiyil
Aanandhamudanae paaduvomae - 2

1. Magizhvudan avarai aaraadhipom
Mangala geethangal muzhangiduvom (2)
Avarae thaevan endrarivom avarae nammaip padaithaarae

2. Naam avar maeychalin aadugalaam
Naamae avaradhu perumakkalaam (2)
Thudhip pugazhodu nuzhaindhiduvom thooya avaradhu vaasalkalil

3. Thaevanin thiruppeyar potriduvom
Thaevanin nanmaigal saatriduvom (2)
Thaevanin kirubai unmaiyumae
Thalaimurai thalaimurai needikkumae

title: Aandavar Vazhiyil Aayaththam
lyrics:
Aandhavar vazhiyai aayatham seivom
Ahavarin paadhaigalai semmaiyaai aakkuvom (2)
Selluvom - 2 avar vazhiyil naam selluvom (2)

1. Pallathaakkugalaellam niravach seivom
Malaigal kundrugalaellam thaazhthi vaippom (2)
Konalaanavatrai naeraaga aakkuvom - 2
Karadumuradhaanavatrai samamaakki vazhinadappom

2. Manidharallaarum thamadhu meetpaik kaana
Kadavul vandhuvittaar nammaik kanduvittaar (2)
Manam thirumbuvom narcheidhi nambuvom - 2
Vinnarasu nerungi vittadhu nammidai vandhuvittadhu

title: Aandavarae Um Illam
lyrics:
Aandhavarae um illam varugiraen varugiraen - 2
Varugiraen varugiraen un illam thaedi varugiraen
Varugiraen varugiraen un anbaip paadi varugiraen (2)
Aandhavarae un illam varugindraen
Adaikkalam naadi un peedam varugiraen thozhugiraen - 2 (2)
Un vazhi nadandhida sebikka varugiraen
Viyathagu seyalkalai enni viyakkiraen

1. Anbinaip pagirndhida varugiraen
Un arulinil nanaindhida varugiraen
Ulladhai uvappudan tharugiraen
Un oliyinil vaazhndhida vizhaigiraen
Thaayin karuvil enaith thaerndhu kondai
Karangal pididhu enai azhaithu vandhaai
Iraivaa en iraivaa en aadhaaram neeyaagavaa
Imaigal pola enaik kaathu nindraai
Un karathil en peyaraip porithu vaithaai
Irulaip pazhikkaamal oli aetru - en
Idhayam kalangaamal uravaada un oliyinil kalandhiduvaen

2. Naano siruvanendru vilagi nindraen
Aedhum ariyaenendru thayangi nindraen
Iraivaa en iraivaa en nallaayan neeyaaga va
Umadhu vaarthaigalaip paesap panithaai
Umadhu panikku enaith thaerndhu kondai
Kadamai maravaadhu pani seyya en
Kanavu nanavaaga dhinam uzhaikka un uravinil kalandhiduvaen

title: Aaviyilum Endrum Unmaiyilum
lyrics:
Aaviyilum endrum unmaiyilum vazhibada vaarungal
Indha avaniyil iraivan arasinaik kaanum
Aanandham paarungal (2)

1. Ulagin maandhargalae ungal idhayathait thirandhidungal
Iraivaarthaiyin porul kaanungal
Igam vaazhndhidum murai kaelungal

2. Ulagin maandhargalae ungal karangalthait thirandhidungal
Wariyorukku vazhikaattungal valampongida vagaikoorungal

title: Aesuvae Endrum Ennudan
lyrics:
Aesuvae endrum ennudan irundhu
Ennai nadathumaiya
Ennai muzhudhum undhan paadhathil
Arppanam thandhaenaiyaa (2)

1. Kalangaadhae maganae endrazhaithu thahm
Kaikalil ennaith thaangugindraar (2)
Kadavul naan unnarugil kaalamum iruppaen engindraar - 2

2. Valimaiyum thidamum naanaavaen nam
Valakkaram unnaik kaakkum endraar (2)
Edhirigal unnaich choozhndhaalum
En peyar unnai meetkum endraar (2)

title: Aesuvil Inainthida Iraimayil
lyrics:
Aesuvil inaindhida iraimaiyil nanaindhida
Ezhundhingu vaareer iraimakkalae
Anbinil kalandhida arulinil valandhida
Niraivudan vaareer maanidarae
Ezruga ezruga iraimakkalae varuga varuga maanidarae - 2

1. Pudhiyadhor aaviyum pudhiyadhor idhayamum
Peruvanadhu vaazhvin kodaiyandro (2)
Adhai adaiya muyalvadhum amaidhi kaanbadhum
Agilam vaazhum vazhiyandro (2)

2. Uravinil valandhida unmaiyil nilaithida
Tannaiyae thandhavar iraivanandro (2)
Avar arasinaik kaana ondraai inaindhadhum
Pudhuyugam kaanum muraiyandro (2)

title: Aesuvin Sannithiyil Magizhvom
lyrics:
Aesuvin sannidhiyil magizhvom vaarungal
En devanil nam iesuvil inaindhu magizhungal - 2

1. Sandhangal pala vannangal undhan bandhangal dhinam paaduvaen
Ennangal sangeethangal endrum en inba sugaraagangal
Nee seidha nanmaigal en vaazhvin vidiyalgal
Endrendrum naan paaduvaen (2)

2. Kaalangal pala naalulae undhan kanivaana arul thaarumae
Thaagangal ini maarumae endrum en aanma kurai theerumae
En aayut kaalangal un anbil naan vaazha
En illam thangiduvaai (2)

title: Aesuvin Thalaimayil Puthiyathor
lyrics:
Aesuvin thalaimaiyil pudhiyadhor ulagam
Amaithida ezhundhiduvom - nam
Idhayathil ezhundhidum ennangal yaavaiyum
Isaiyudan muzhangiduvom - 2
Iraikulamae ezruga aa iraiyarasae varuga - 2

1. Ezhaihal vaazhum therukkalil irangi
Aesuvae nadandhu sendraar - nam
Iraivanin arasu avargalukkuriya dhu
Enbadhai edhuthuch chonnaar (2) andha
Iraimagan iesuvin paadhangal vazhiyil
Payanathait thodandhiduvom (vaazhkai) - 2

2. Siraigalil vaazhvor vidudhalai adaivar
Endru aesu chonnaar - avar
Odukkappa ttorukkum urimaiyat rorukkum
Vazhanguvaen vaazhvu endraar (2)
Nam vizhigalait thirandhu ulaginaip paarppom
Aaviyin vazhinadappom thooya aaviyin vazhinadappom

title: Amaithi Thaedi Alaiyum
lyrics:
Amaidhi thaedi alaiyum nenjamae
Anaithum ingu avaril thanjamae (2)
Nilaiyaana sondham neengaadha bandham - 2
Avarandri vaerillaiyae

1. Potruvaen en thaevanai paraichatruvaen en naadhanai
Ennaalumae en vaazhvilae (2)
Kaadumaedu pallam endru kaalgal soorndhu alaindha aadu
Naadudhae adhu thaedudhae (2)

2. Iraivanae en idhayamae indha
Iyarkaiyin nal iyakamae
En thaevanae en thalaivanae (2)
Parandhu virindha ulagam padaithu sirandha padaippaai
Ennaik kanda thaevanae en jeevanae (2)

title: Anbai Kondaduvom
lyrics:
Anbaik kondaaduvom irai anbil ondraaguvom
Indha ulagil manidhanalam malarndhu maanbadaiya
Panbodu naam vaazhuvom niraivaazhvai naam kaanuvom (2)

1. Pagaimai unarvugalai naam kalaindhu
Paasathait pozhindhae vaazhuvom (2)
Vaetrumai nilaigalai madhithinghu
Otrumaiyudanae pazhaguvom
Anbirku ilakkanamaagidavae
Andraadam uravugal valarndhidavae
Ondru saervom uravil inaivom
Iraivan virumbum ulagam padaippom

2. Paagubaadugalai naam veruthu
Pagirvilae samathuvam kaanuvom (2)
Pilavugal pinakkugal oyndhingu
Piraraiyum naesikkath thuvanguvom
Ullangal ondraaga inaindhidavae
Ulagellaam niraiyanbu thulangidavae - ondru saervom

title: Anbin Thirukkulame
lyrics:
Anbin thirukkulamae irai Aesuvin ariyanaiyae
Ezhuvom oru manadhaai koodith thozhuvom pugazhp baliyaai (2)
Iraikulamae ezhuvom iraiyarasai amaippom
Maraiyudalaai varuvom thiruppaliyil inaivom (2)

1. Irulin aatchiyai muriyadikka
Andru nigazhndha baliyai ninaippom
Iraivan maindhanae balipporulaai
Thannai izhandha thiyaagam uraippom (2)
Suyanalam maraiya samathuvam malara
Anbu parivu konda iraikulam valarppom

2. Iraivan vaarthaiyai edhuthuraikkum - indha
Iniya baliyil inaivom
Uravu virundhinai parimaarum
Thiruvirundhu pagirvil magizhvom (2)
Valimaiyil valara vaanjaiyil thigazha
Vallal iesuvin azhaippinai aerppom

title: Anbin Vizhuthugal Padarnthidavae
lyrics:
Anbin vizhudhugal padarndhidavae
Manidha maanbugal uyirthida
Manach siraiyin kadhavugal udaindhidavae
Irai unarvugal vaazhattum - 2 (2)

1. Vazhibaattil kaanum unarvugal nam
Vaazhvil nadhiyaayp paayattum (2)
Vaedhathil vaazhum panbugal nam
Manadhil vaazhvaai amaiyattum (2)
Pudhiya paadhaiyil thodarndhu pudhuyugam naam padaippom - 2
Ini varum naalil pudhu vaazhvil iraiinbam kaanbom

2. Vaarthaigal paesum unmaigal nam
Idhayathil uyiraai vaazhattum (2)
Urimaiyil pootha uravugal pudhuk
Kavidhaigal paadi magizhattum - pudhiya paadhaiyil

title: Anbinil Pirantha Iraikkulam
lyrics:
Anbinil pirandha iraikulam naamae
Anbinhaik kaathu aram valarppoomae - 2

1. Oru manadhooraai anaivarum vaazhvom
Aruloli veesum oru vazhi povom (2)
Pirivinai maaythu thirumarai kaappom - 2
Parivulla iraivan thiruvolam kaanbom

2. Pirappilum iesu irappilum iesu
Perumai seidhaarae punidhap paeranbai (2)
Pirandha nam vaazhvin payanpera vaendum - 2
Piraraiyum namaip pol ninaithida vaendum

title: Anbinil Pirantha
lyrics:
Anbinil pirandha iraikulam naamae
Anbinhaik kaathu aram valarppoomae - 2

1. Oru manadhooraai anaivarum vaazhvom
Aruloli veesum oru vazhi povom (2)
Pirivinai maaythu thirumarai kaappom - 2
Parivulla iraivan thiruvolam kaanbom

2. Pirappilum iesu irappilum iesu
Perumai seidhaarae punidhap paeranbai (2)
Pirandha nam vaazhvin payanpera vaendum - 2
Piraraiyum namaip pol ninaithida vaendum

title: Anbu Maanthar Anaivarumae
lyrics:
Anbu maandhar anaivarumae vaarungal
Iraivan azhaippai aetru avaril magizhungal iraiyarasin

1. Iesuvil naamum vaazhndhida vaendum
Avarin paadhaiyilae naam nadandhidada vaendum (2)
Paavam pokkida vaendum kobam neekkida vaendum
Endrum - aduthavarai anbu seyya vaendum - 2

2. Aaviyin varangal naam pera vaendum
Avarin aatralodu panipuriya vaendum (2)
Manidham malarndhida vaendum punidham adaindhida vaendum
Adhanaal - idaividaadhu naam sebikka vaendum - 2

title: Ani Aniyaai Vaarungal
lyrics:
Ani aniyaai vaarungal anbu maandharae
Aandhavar iesuvin saatchi neengalae (2)

1. Anbuppaniyaalae ulagai vellungal
Inba thunbam edhaiyum thaangidungal (2)
Eliyavar vaazhvil thunainindru
Iesuvin saatchiyaai nilaithirungal (2)

2. Mannagathil porulais saerkka vaendaam
Maraindhu ozhindhu poividumae (2)
Vinnil porulai dhinam saerthu
Iesuvin saatchiyaai nilaithirungal (2)

title: Archchanai Malarai Aalayaththil
lyrics:
Archanai malaraaga aalayathil varugindrom
Aanandhamai pugazh geetham endrum paaduvom (2)
Arppanithu vaazhndhida anbar ummil valarndhida
Aasaiyodu arul vaendip panigindrom (2)

1. Thaayin karuvilae uruvaagum munnarae
Arindhu engalait thaerndha dheivamae
Paaviyaayinum pachach pillaiyaayinum
Archithirukkindreer karpithirukkindreer
Manidharaagap punidharaaga vaazhap panikkindreer
Pirarum vaazha engal vaazhvaik kodukka azhaikkindreer
Anjaadhae endru emmaik kaathu varugindreer

2. Umadhu vaarthaiyai engal vaayil oottineer
Umadhu paadhaiyai engal paadhaiyaakkineer
Umadhu maatchiyai emmil thulangach seigindreer
Umadhu saatchiyaai naangal vilangach solkindreer
Azhithu ozhikkak kavizhthu veezhthath thittam theettineer
Katti ezhuppa nattu vaikka emmai anuppineer
Anjaadhae endru emmaik kaathu varugindreer

title: Arputha Anbarin Adi Thozhavae
lyrics:
Arbudha anbanin adithozhavae
Avarin paadham ani thiralvom
Ithanai igam vaazh uyirgalumae
Iesuuvai vanangidumae (2)

1. Aalayamaniyin oosaiyaik kaetpom
Aayanae nammaik kooppidak kaetpom (2)
Aaviyin arulaal aravazhi nadappom
Avarin vaarthaiyai vaazhvinil aerppom (2)
Anbinil inaivom arulil nilaipom
Aanandhamai vaazhvom (naam) - (2)

2. Aalayak kadhavu thirandhidap paarthom
Aandhavan sannidhi vanangiyae nindrom (2)
Anbuk karangal kooppiyae thozhuvom
Avarin arulaal aarudhal adaivom (2) anbinil

title: Arutkaram Thaedi Un
lyrics:
Arutkaram thaedi un aalaya peedam
Alai alaiyaaga varugindrom
Aruviyaai vazhiyum un arulinil nanaiya
Aanandhamaaga varugindrom (2)

1. Aayiram aayiram aasaigalaal
Aadidum oodamaai em vaazhkai (2)
Moozhgidum vaelaiyil em thalaivaa
Um karamdhaanae emmaik karaisaerkkum
Perum puyalo ezhum alaiyo
Nidham varumo oli irukka (2)
Naalumae emmaik kaathidum undhan

2. Aarudhal thaedum idhayangalo
Anbinaith thaedi alaigindradhu (2)
Thaetrida viraiyum em thalaivaa - um
Dheiveegak karamdhaanae emaith thaetrum
Kodum piniyo varum pirivo
Thuyar tharumo thunai irukka (2)
Naalumae anbaayk kaathidum undhan

title: Azhaikkirar Yesu Aandavar
lyrics:
Azhaikkiraar yesu aandhavar
Aavalaai naam selluvom (2)
Avar baliyinil kalandhida avar oliyinil nadandhida - 2
Saatchigalaai endrum vaazhndhida innaalilae

1. Thaediyae thaevan varugiraar thannaiyae naalum tharugiraar
Thoolgalil nammaith thaanguvaar thuyarinil avar thaetruvaar
Sumaigalai sugangalaaga maatruvaar
Valamudan vaazhum vazhiyaik kaattuvaar (2)
Vaarungal oorudalaai inaindhiduvom
Vaanagath thandhaiyai naam vanangiduvom

2. Anbinaal ulagai aaluvaar aaviyaal nammai nirappuvaar
Amaidhiyai endrum aruluvaar aanandham nenjil pozhiguvaar
Vidiyalin geethamaaga muzhanguvaar
Vidudhalai vaazhvai namakku vazhanguvaar (2) vaarungal

title: Azhaikkum Iraivan Kuralai Kaettu
lyrics:
Azhaikkum iraivan kuralaikkaettu ezhundhu vaarungal
Anaithum avarin sangamamaaga viraindhu vaarungal (2)
Bali seluthidavae balan adaindhidavae - 2
Padaitha thaevan pugazh parappap panindhu vaarungal

1. Paadhai kaattum aayanaaga iraivan azhaikkindraar
Paavam neekki paasam kaatta thaevan azhaikkindraar (2)
Anbin aatchiyae avarin maatchiyae - 2
Padaitha thaevan pugazh parappap panindhu vaarungal

2. Vaazhvu vazhangum vaarthaiyaaga vaazha azhaikkindraar
Vaari vazhangum vallalaaga paraman azhaikkindraar (2)
Niraindha vaazhvilae nammai nirappavae - 2
Iniya thaevan nammai azhaikka inaindhu vaarungal

title: Chinna Chinna Pookkal
lyrics:
Chinna chinna pookkal sirikkudhu
Engum singaaramaai vandhu paadudhu (2)
Enna ninaithu indha inba alaiyo - 2
Mannan indru vandha iravil

1. Nenjil unakkoor idam thandhu rasippaen
Poobaalam unakkaai naam paaduvaen (2)
Endhan vizhi vaasalilae naan unakkaai kaathiruppaen (2)
En vaazhvin selvam neeyaaguvaai
Indha ezhaiyin kanavum neeyaaguvaai
Mannan indru vandha iravil

2. Undhan varavaal manam pongi magizhum
Oyaadha thunbangal enai neengidum (2)
Nilaiyaana en sondhamae manam niraivaana en bandhamae (2)
En manak koottaiyil poovaaguvaai
En vaazhvu malarndhida vazhiyaaguvaai
Mannan indru vandha iravil

title: Deva Un Thiruvadiyai
lyrics:
Dhaevaa un thiruvadiyai endrendrum naan thaeduvaen
Naadhaa un sannidhiyai dhinandhoorum naan naaduvaen (2)
Sugamaana ninaivaalae suramaana sollaalae - 2
Nidham undhan padham thaeduvaen - un
Arulaalae uyir vaazhuvaen

1. Irulaana ulagathilae nee oliyaaga varavaendumae - 2
Thadumaari thavaraaga naan vaazhumboodhu
Vazhikaatti enaik kaakka vaa enakkaaga uyir vaazhbavaa
Oliyaaga vazhiyaaga uyiraaga vandhu
Enakkaaga uyir neethavaa - kalvaari baliyaanavaa

2. Nilaiyillaa ulagathilae nee nilai vaazhvu tharavaendumae - 2
Poyyaana sugam thaedi naan vaazhumboodhu
Meignaana sudar aanavaa irulneekki arul aanavaa
Uyiraaga uravaaga niraivaazhvu thandhu
Iraiyaaga enai aalbavaa - en iesu manuvaanavaa

title: Ennai Azhaiththaar
lyrics:
Ennai azhaithaar ennai azhaithaar
En peyaraiy solli aesu azhaithaar
Ennai azhaithaar ennai azhaithaar
Than thirumugam kaana iesu azhaithaar

1. Naan aadiduvaen naan paadiduvaen
Avar samogathil magizhndhiduvaen (2)
Saranaagadhi naan adaindhiduvaen - 2
Sagalamum avaridam padaithiduvaen

2. Anudhinam avarai naan thudhithiduvaen
Dharisithida naan vizhithiduvaen (2)
Irai vaarthaiyil naan nilaithirundhu - 2
Avaranbil muzhumai adaindhiduvaen

title: Inainthiduvom Iraimakkale
lyrics:
Inaindhiduvom iraimakkalae iesuvin sannidhiyil
Sumaigalai thaangi sugamae kodukkum iesuvin baliyinilae
Inaindhom iesuvin baliyinilae (2)
Koodiduvom kudumbamaai koodiduvom
Maariduvom iraisamogamaai maariduvom

1. Moovoru kadavular mudivillaa pirasannam
Kudumbamaai inaikkindradhu
Nammaik kudumbamaai inaikkindradhu (2)
Baliyinil kalandhu uravinil inaiya
Nammaiyae azhaikkindradhu
Indru nammaiyae azhaikkindradhu - koodiduvom ...

2. Iesuvil vaazhndhida vaazhvaiyae baliyaakka
Paadhai kaattukindradhu - pudhiya paadhai kaattukindradhu (2)
Sodhanai vendru saadhanai padaikka
Aatral tharugindradhu namakku aatral tharugindradhu
Koodiduvom

title: Inaiyilla Iravanin Thirupugazhai
lyrics:
Inaiyillaa iraivanin thiruppugazhai
Anaivarum inaindhae paadiduvom (2)

1. Arul nirai aayan akkalithu
Aanandhathil nammai moozhgadithu (2)
Paramborul avan paadham thanaiyae naam
Parivudan pootri vaazhndhiduvom (2)

2. Vaanura uyarndha malaigalumae
Vanna ezhil nirai malargalumae (2)
Unnaith thaedum chinna uyirgalumae nidham
Unnadha iraivanai vaazhthidumae (2)

title: Inbam Pongum Naalinile
lyrics:
Inbam pongum naalinalae iniya nal vaelaiyilae
Idhayangalin sangamamae iraiyarasil mangalamae

1. Ulagam kanda udhayam nammil uravu konda idhayam
Manangal anbil inaiyum arul
Mazhaiyil malarndhu nanaiyum
Kuraigal yaavum indru karaindhidumae - mana
Niraivu kaana nenjam viraindhidumae (2)

2. Aghandhai anaithum azhiyum - mannil
Adimaik koolam ozhiyum
Anbin theebam olirum thaevan arulil yaavum milirum
Payanam inidhu ingu thodandhidumae - anbin
Paadhai paarengum padarndhidumae (2)

title: Iniya Geethangal Isaiththiduvom
lyrics:
Iniya geethangal isaithiduvom
Pudhiya gaanangal muzhangiduvom (2)
Iraivan vandhu thangum naduvil namadhu illam amaippom - 2
Varuvom inaindhu varuvom inaivom avaril inaivom (2)
Aanandhamaaga koodiduvom naam avaril vaazhndhu magizhvom

1. Iruvar moovar iraivan peyaraal koodumboodhu avar iruppaar
Thooya ullam kondu varuvom
Theeyaseyalai veezhthi magizhvom
Vinnum mannum inaiyum baliyil
Uravup paalam amaikka ezhuvom (2)
Manidhaneyam vellum enbom
Ulagai anbaal niraippom - varuvom

2. Pagaiyum irulum vilagum baliyil paraman karunai kondu
Vazhiyil siluvai marathin thiyaaga vaazhvai
Theeba oliyaai aetri magizhvom
Engum niraiyum aaviyarin kodaigalaalae
Niraivu peruvom (2)
Aezhai manidharil iraiyaik kaanbom
Avarai madhithuth thozhuvom

title: Irai Baliyinil Inainthiduvom
lyrics:
Irai baliyinil inaindhiduvom
Iraivanil kalandhiduvom
Idhayathil iruppavarae iraigulamaai varuvom
Irai magimaikkaaga uzhaippom nammil
Manidham malara inaivom (2)

1. Iraivan vaarthaiyil illam amaithida
Iesu vazhiyil selvom
Uravu valam pera unmai urubera ulagil saatchiyaavom (2)
Kalvaarip baliyin ninaivae em vaazhvil vasandham varumae - 2
Irai magimaikkaaga...

2. Aezhai eliyavar iraivan seidhiyai aetru magizhas seivom
Maarum ulagil maaraa un anbil
Maatram kandu kolvom (2)
Kalvaarip baliyin ninaivae em vaazhvil vasandham varumae - 2

title: Irai Uravill Malarnthiduvom
lyrics:
Irai uravil malarndhiduvom inaindhu vaarungal
Iniya thaevan thandha baliyil magizhndhu koodungal (2)

Vaarungal vaarungal thandhai illam vaarungal
Paadungal paadungal iesu naamam paadungal (2)

1. Udhayamagum iniya uravu vaarungal
Ulagil sendru balan tharavaae koodungal
Bagirum ullam naam peruvom vaarungal
Paraman anbil vaazhndhiduvom koodungal

2. Sumai marandhu sugam peruvom vaarungal
Imai thirandhu vidiyal kaanag koodungal
Irul marandhu oli niraiyum vaarungal - naam
Arul vaazhvil magizhndhiduvom koodungal

title: Iraianbil Vaazha Ezhum
lyrics:
Iraiyanbil vaazha ezhum iraigulamae
Iraiyarul peravae inaindhiduvom
Iraivanin arasu igamengum parava
Inidhaai inaivom thiruppali seivom (2)

Ezhuvom inaivom tharuvom namaith tharuvom - 2

1. Manidharin urimaiyai madhithidavum
Manidharin maanbinaip pootridavum (2)
Eliyavar aetrangal petridavum
Iraimagan baliseiya azhaikkindraar - 2

2. Suyanala avalangal ozhindhidavum
Sudhandhira vaazhvinai adaindhidavum (2)
Sumaigalaich sugamaai maatridavum
Thirumagan nammai dhinam azhaikkindraar - 2

title: Iraikulame Ezhuga Iraippathame
lyrics:
Iraigulamae ezruga iraipadhamae varuga - 2
Punitha nannaalil pugazhndhidavae
Pudhuvazhvil dhinam thilaithidavae
Vaetrumai neekki verumaiyaip pookki
Iraivan iesuvil vaazhdhidavae

1. Paadhangal kazhuviya paramanin thooya
Panidhanai thodarnidavae (2)
Paarinil engum avaradhu thirumugam padaippinil unarndhidavae
Bagirndhidha varuvom nammaiyae tharuvom - 2
Igamadhil endrum saatchiyaai vaazhvom

2. Siluvaiyin thiyaagap baliyinil kalandhu
Sirumaigal pookkidavae (2)
Sindhiya iesuvin kurudhiyinaalae agavoliyaagidavae
Anburavaagum agilathaik kaana - 2
Anaivarum varuvom avarilae inaivom

title: Iraikkulamae Thrirukulamae
lyrics:
Iraigulamae thirukkulamae thanmaana thamizhkkulamae
Iraivan nammai azhaikkiraar vaarungal
Aezhaiyarae iniyavarae sumaidhaangi soorndhavarae
Iraivan indru uraippadhaik kaelungal (2)

Pudhiya ulagam padaithida pudhu samogamaai maarida
Pudhiya vaazhvil ondru kooduvom (2)

1. Anbin baalamaagavae iraivan azhaikkiraar
Iniya uravai valarkkavae iraivan azhaikkiraar (2)
Vaarungal vaarungal anbin baalamaagavae
Koodungal koodungal iniya uravai valarkkavae
Pudhiya vidiyal thaediyae viraindhu selluvom
Uravaip pagirndhu vaazhavae ondru kooduvom

2. Thozhamaiyil inanivavae iraivan azhaikkiraar
Thondu vaazhvaith thodaravae iraivan azhaikkiraar (2)
Vaarungal vaarungal thozhamaiyil inaindhidavae
Koodungal koodungal thondu vaazhvaith thodaravae - pudhiya

title: Iraimagan Yesu Azhaikkindrar
lyrics:
Iraimagan iesu azhaikkindraar
Igathinil namakku vaazhvalikka (2)
Iraimagan iesu azhaikkindraar

Allaelooyaa allaelooyaa - 4

1. Uyirum unavum naanae endraar
Enai undaal vaazhdhiduveer (2)
Ulagin oliyum naanae endraar
Unmaiyin vazhiyum naanae endraar
Ulaginil namakkup pugazhidam ivarae - 2

2. Unnadha iesuvin paadham panivom
Unnai anbu seivadhu poola
Ayalaanai naesi endraar (2)
Ulaginil eliyoorkku seidhadhellam
Enakkae seidheer endruraithaar - ulaginil namakku

title: Iraimakkal Agamagizhnthu Varugindra
lyrics:
Iraimakkal agamaghizhndhu varugindra thiruppavani - 2
Thiruchabai inaindhu kiristhuvoodu tharumae thiyaagap bali
Vaaraai iraithirukkulamae vaazhvaai paerudanae - 2

1. Malarudan serum yaavumae manam pettru vaazhdhal needhiyae - 2
Puvivaazhvai naamum tharavae iraimaanbai indrae peravae
Virandhaai varuvom thaevan arul peruvom
Iraivan nizhalil vaazhvin porul peruvom - Vaaraai

2. Magizhghudan paadum vaelaiyae manangalin soorvai neekkumae - 2
Thiruvaazhvaith thaedi peruvom maraivaazhvin nanmai adaivom
Panivaai kulamaai iesu padham inaivom
Maraiyin vazhiyil vaedha oli peruvom - Vaaraai

title: Iraimakkal Ondru Kooduvom
lyrics:
Iraimakkal ondrukooduvom - dheiva
Irakkathai naam kondaaduvom (2)
Idhayangalhai ezhuppuvom udhayangalhaik kaanuvom - 2
Irakkam ennum neeroottrai alli allip paruguvom

1. Padaithu nammaip paadhukaakkum thandhaiyin irakkam
Vaan thandhaiyin irakkam
Uyirai eendhu ulagai meetkum aandavar irakkam
Iesu aandavar irakkam (2)
Varangal pozhindhu vazhinadathum aaviyin irakkam - 2 indha
Irakkam endrum nilaithidum iraivan arasu malarndhidum - 2
Anbu needhi amaidhi vazhiyil pudhiya ulagu padaithidum

2. Paavam seidhu thirindha poodhum thaedidum irakkam
Vandhu thaedidum irakkam
Paadhai thaedi alaiyumboodhu thodarnidhum irakkam
Thodarnidhum irakkam (2)
Sumaigalaalae thuvahumboodhu thaangidum irakkam - 2 indha
Irakkapperukkaip poottruvom viyandhu naamum vaazhthuvom (2)
Vaanam pugazhndhu aadi magizhndhu idhaya theebam aettruvom

title: Iraimakkalae Kathiron Mugam
lyrics:
Iraimakkalae kadhiron mugam nookkum malaraai
Iraivan munvaruvom (2)
Thiruppaliyinil inaindhu baliyaagum
Iraivan arasai amaithiduvom (2)

Kiristhu marithaar kiristhu uyirthaar
Meendum varuvaar endrunarndhae
Agila iraivan arasai amaikka
Meetkum baliyil pangaerppoom
Meetpar baliyil ondrinaivom

1. Aandavarae kadavul endru unarungal
Avarae nammaip padaithavarae naamo avar makkal (2)
Aandavarai magizhchiyudan vazhipada vaarungal
Magizhchinirai paadaludan avar thirumun varuvom - 2

2. Nandriyudan avar vaayilgalil nuzhaiyungal
Endrum paeranbu ullavarae aandavar nallavarae (2)
Anaithulagoorae aarpparithu avarai vaazhthungal
Ezhuchiyudan ondrinaivom nanmaiyin baliyalippoom - 2

title: Iraimakkalae Koodivaarungal
lyrics:
Iraimakkalae koodivaarungal ungal
Irugaramum kooppi vaarungal (2)
Urudhiyaana nambikkaiyil iraiyidam varam kaelungal
Kaettadhellam kaettapadi kidaithadhendru magizhungal

1. Kadugalavu nambikkaiyaal kadalaiyumae
Kaltharayaayk kaayachcheyyalaam
Anu alavu nambikkaiyaal imayathaiyum
Aazhkadalil moozhkach cheyyalaam
Unnudaiya nambikkaiyae unnaik kunamaakkiyadhu - 2
Endru sollum iraivaakkai idhayathilae sumandhavaraai

2. Oruvaarthai sonnaalae poodhumaiyaa
Orukuraiyum illaamal poogumaiyaa
Unadhaadai vilimbai naan thottaal poodhum
Oodividum udanadiyaai innoiy endraar
Unnudaiya nambikkaiyae

title: Iraimanitha Sangamam Nigazhum
lyrics:
Iraimanidha sangamam nigazhum idamidhu
Anburavin punidhamum kamazhum naalidhu
Amaidhi ingae pirakkudhu arppanam ingae valarudhu
Naanilathai magizhchiyinaal nirappudhu (2)

1. Anbar pani seydhidavae inba nilai adaindhidavae
Anbuk kural nenjamadhil olikkudhu
Anbil sevai malarndhidavae karangal ulagil thazhaithidavae
Arul mazhai ullangalai nanaikkudhu
Anbu oottru surakkum idam thiyaagap paniyandroo
Atthagu seyalil niraivukaanal dheivach seyalandroo (2)
Punidhamaana pani vaazhvil uruvaagum sangamamae
Irai manidham adhuvae irai manidham

2. Oongum kodumai ozhindhidavae madiyum uyirgal uyirthidavae
Otrumaiyin chinnangalaai vaazhdhiduvom
Vanmurai neekki vaazhdhidavae manidha naeyam kaathidavae
Madhangal kadandha uravukkaaga uzhaithiduvom
Saadhi sandhaigal samaya moogangal alagai nirangalae
Sathiya neriyil udhikkum veeram iraivan mugangalae (2)
Arul vaazhvin gnaanathil ezgugindra pudhuvaazhvae
Iraimanidham adhuvae irai manidham

title: Irai Makkal Yavarum
lyrics:
Iraimakkal yaavarum koodiduvom
Iraivanhaip pugazhndhu paadiduvom
Iraippani dhanaiseiya avar azhaikkaar
Avar pugazh paadiduvom - 2

1. Anbaalae iraivan thannaik kodutthaar
Arulaalae nammai aravanaitthaar (2)
Naam avar mandhaiyin aadugalaai - 2
Baliyaaga nammaith therindedutthaar
Avar azhaikkaar anbil panitthaar iraiyarasu perugidavae

2. Kuruvodu saerndhu naam aalayathil
Kudumbamaai balidhanaich selutthiduvom (2)
Iraimagan udalai naam undiduvom - 2
Iraimakkal ena naam vaazhndhiduvom
Avar anbin kural naam kaettiduvom
Iraiyarasaipp arappiduvom

title: Iraiva Itho Varugindrom
lyrics:
Iraivaa idhoo varugindroom
Umthiru ullam niraivaettra (2)

1. Kallaana idhayathai edutthuvidu - emaik
Kanivulla nenjudanae vaazhavidu (2)
Emmaiyae naangal marakkavidu - 2 nenjam
Aenaiyoor thunbam ninaikkavidu

2. Baliyena unavaith tharugindroom - nidham
Pasitthoorkku unavida marakkindroom (2)
Kadamai mudindhadhena ninaikkindroom - 2 engal
Kangalhaik konjam thirandhuvidu

title: Iraiva Um Peedam
lyrics:
Iraivaa un peedham vandhaen ennil
Niraivaai um arulaik kandaen
Maraipootrum iraivaa un urai kaetkavae indru
Iraivaa un peedham vandhaen

1. Nilavinil oliyinaiyp pool nenjam un
Ninaivinilae adhan uyir thanjam (2)
Neer endhan uyiraai ninaivendra malaraai
Neengaamal ennai nidham vaithuk kaappaai (2)

2. Vaanathil parandhidum paravaiyinam pool
Vaazhkaiyil kavalaigal enakkillai (2)
Vaazhgindraen undhan vaazhvaip pinthodandhu
Vaazhgingra enakku vazhiyaai nee iruppaai (2)

title: Iraiva Un Tharisanam
lyrics:
Iraivaa un dharisanam naan thaedi vandhaen
Unpaadham saranaaguvaen iraivaa un paadham saranaaguvaen
Endrum unnoodu naanum uravaada vaandugiraen
Unpaadham saranaaguvaen iraivaa un paadham saranaaguvaen

1. Iraivaa un vaarthai nidhamum kaetka
Un paadham amarndhullaen - 2 (2) endrum
Un vaarthai nijamaandhu un vaarthai maaraadhadhu
Vaanam pozhivadhum boomi sezhivadhum undhan vaarthaiyaalae
Ingu makkal yaavarum magizhndhu vaazhvadhum
Undhan vaarthaiyaalae - indha ulagellam azhindhu
Mannoodu maraindhaalum un vaarthai azhiyaadhu
Un vaarthai azhiyaadhadhu (iraivaa) - 2

2. Keezhvaanam sivakka vidiyal muzhanga
Un raagam isaithiduvaen - 2 (2) endrum
Un vaarthai oliyaandhu un vaarthai uyirulladhu
Poymai azhivadhum unmai nilaippadhum
Undhan vaarthaiyaalae - ingu
Naermaip paadhaiyil manidhar nadappadhum undhan vaarthaiyaalae
Naan oorengum selvaen un vaarthai solvaen
Un anbil nilaithiruppaen (iraivaa) - 2

title: Iraivan Nammai Azhaikkindrarae
lyrics:
Iraivan nammai azhaikkindraarae viraindhu vaarungal
Pudhiya ulagam padaithidavae magizhndhu koodungal
Iraivan arasu valarndhidavae iraivaarthai vazhangidavae - 2
Inidhae inaindhae sendriduvom

1. Thaayin karuvinilae nammaith therindedutthaar
Avarin kaigalilae nam peyaraip poritthu vaitthaar (2)
Avaril nammai arppanam seiya
Manidha maanbu mannil uyara (2)
Ezhuveer varuveer iesu vazhiyilae

2. Anbup paniyinilae iraivanin sollilae
Aezhai manidharilae iesuvaik kaanavae (2)
Unmai needhi naermai nilaikka
Poymai saadhi vanmai azhikka (2)
Ezhuveer varuveer iesu vazhiyilae

title: Iraivan Padaiththa Naalil
lyrics:
Iraivan padaittha naalil
Inaivom iesu peyaril
Iraivanin anbil iraimakkalaavom
Kiristhuvil indru pudhu vaazhvu kaanbom - 2 aa aa

1. Ulagam ellaam oorkulamaai
Inaindhida iraivan ninaitthaarae (2)
Adhu nanavaagida nammil niraivaerida - 2
Anbaalae thaerndhedutthaar

2. Kodaana kodi maandharilae koomagan nammai thaerndhaarae - 2
Avar anbaanadhu nam uyiraanadhu - 2
anbaagach chaerndhiduvom

title: Iraivanai Pugazhvom
lyrics:
Iraivanaip pugazhvom vaarungal
Maraimakkal yaavarum koodungal
Ellaa kaalathilum ellaa idangalilum
Avar peyar solli vaazhthungal
Iraivaa idhoo varugindroom - 2

1. Iraivan nammai thaerndhedutthaar
Karaiyil kulamaai maattri vittaar (2)
Irulil nindru viduvitthaar
Ariyadham olikku namai azhaitthaar

2. Andru naam iraivan makkal illai
Indravar pudhalvar yaarillai (2)
Andru naam irakkam ariyavillai
Indravar irakkam yaarukkillai

title: Iraivanai Pugazhvom Varungale
lyrics:
Iraivanaip pugazhvom vaarungalae
Inaiyillaa anbil inaindhiduvom (2)
Innaalil nammai azhaikkindraar
Elloorum ondraai koodiduvom (2)

1. Irugaram neetti azhaikkindraar
Idhayathai thirandhu azhaikkindraar (2)
Udhayathai thaedi alaivoorin
Ullathai thaedi alaigindraar (2)
Pudhiya vaazhvil punidham peruvom
Punidhan iesu kodukkindraar (2)

2. Anbudan vaazha azhaikkindraar
Arulinaiyp pozhindhu azhaikkindraar (2)
Innalil vaadi azhuvoorin
Idhayathait thaettra azhaikkindraar (2)
Pudhiya vaazhvil punidham peruvom
Punidhan iesu kodukkindraar (2)

title: Iraivanai Thaedum Ithayangale
lyrics:
Iraivanaith thaedum idhayangalae vaarungal
En iraivan yaarandru solvaen kaelungal

1. Paadum kuyilukku paadachcholli thandhavan yaar?
Aadum mayilukku aadach cholli thandhavan yaar?
Avarae en iraivan avarthaal naan panivaen
Avarthaal naan panindhaal agamae magizhndhiruppaen

2. Vaanum mannum vaazhum yaavum padaithavar yaar?
Vaazhum uyirukku vaazhvin mudivaai nilaippavar yaar?
Ennaenna vindhaigal engengu kaangindroom
Anaithirkum adippadaiyil avardhaan kaaranam

title: Iraivanai Thozhavae Arulthanai
lyrics:
Iraivanaith thozhavae aruldhanaiperavae
Iraiyadi amarndhida viraiyoom (2)
Nam idhayathai niraivaai avarilae inaithu
Inbathil nilaithida vizhaiyoom (2)

1. Iraivanin uravil kalandhida
Ezhuvoom inaivoom nammaiyae tharavae
Aaviyin varangalaal nirandhida
Ezhuvoom inaivoom pudhuppadaippaagavae
Manidham malarndhida purappaduvoom - indhab
Payanam thodandhida viraindhiduvoom (2) - 2

2. Manangalil iraivan uraiyavae
Ezhuvoom inaivoom avar pugazh paadavae
Manidharil iraivanaik kaanavae
Ezhuvoom inaivoom anbu seydhidavae - Manidham

title: Iraivanil Inainthida Valamudan
lyrics:
Iraivanil inaindhida valamudan vaazhndhida
Vaarungal vaarungal
Thiruppaliyinil kalandhida paramanil inaindhida
Koodungal koodungal - endrum (2)

1. Anbin saatchiyaai naalum vaazhndhu
Avarin uravilae valarndhiduvom (2) nammaip
Padaittha iraivan pugazh paadi magizhndhida
Baaril avar naamam poottrip pugazhndhida
Anaivarum inaivom aanandhamudanae - endrum

2. Iraivan oliyilae naamum inaindhu
Thiyaagach chudargalaai olirndhiduvom (2) irai
Vaarthaip pozhivilae nenjam nirandhida
Karunai mazhaiyilae vaazhvum thazhaithida
Anaivarum inaivom aanandhamudanae - endrum

title: Iraivanin Baliyil Inainthida
lyrics:
Iraivanin baliyil inaindhida varuvom
Iraivan azhaikkindraar inidhae azhaikkindraar (2)
Thunbam illai thuyaram illai iraivanin uravinilae
Vaazhvundu vazhiyundu iraivanin thunaiyinilae

1. Adimaith thalaiyilirundhu andru munnoorai meetta dhaevan - 2

Paavath thalaiyilirundhu nammai meetkavae azhaikkindraar
Thunbam illai.....

2. Adimai endrazhaikkavillai nammai nanbargal endraarae - 2
Urimai vaazhvu vazhanga nammai peyar solli azhaikkindraar
Thunbam illai

title: Iraivanin Thirukkulamae Varuga
lyrics:
Iraivanin thirukkulamae varuga arasa gurukulamae varuga-2
Karaiyillaa karunaiyin kanivudan kaakkum
Inaiyillaa iraivanin thiruvadi paadi
Magizhndhu pugazhndhu inaindhu viraindhu
Panivom avar padhamae

1. Thaayin karuvinil thoondrumunbae
Thayavaai nammaith therindhaar
Thanipperum karunaiyil nam peyar ellaam
Tham kaiyil poritthu vaitthaar
Thaayaaga naalum saeyaga nammai kanboolak kaakkindraar
Innaalil naamum ondraagak koodi panbaadi panindhiduvom

2. Aranum koottaiyum kaedayamaanaanavar avar pugazh paadiduvom
Vaazhvum vazhiyum valimaiyumaanavar avaradi panindhiduvom
Vattraadha nadhiyaai arulvaari vazhangum balipeedam choozhndhiduvom
Aruloodu naamum uravoodu vaazhvoom
Ulagorkku uraitthivom

title: Iraivanin Thirumun Vaarungal
lyrics:
Iraivanin thirumun vaarungal
Innisai paadi vaazhthungal (2)
Nandrigal niraindha manadhudanae
Avarin naamathait pootrungal
Vaarungal pugazhndhu pootrungal
Nammai vaazhvikkuum dhaevanai (2)

1. Aalaya manigalin oosaidhanil
Aandavar azhaikkiraar vaarungal (2)
Vaazhvu tharum vaarthaiyinaal
Valamikkach seyvaar vaarungal (2)

2. Thunbam thuyaram thollaigalai
Thudaithidach seyvaar thooyaravar (2)
Pagaimai bayam mattrum paavamdhanil
Vidudhalai alippaar vaendhanavar (2)
